behavior_surfaces: desktop chat/session composer textarea paste handling
desktop chat/session composer textarea autosize and overflow containment
generated_surfaces: desktop/dist generated by bun run check:desktop build lane
state_contracts: Pasted text in active-session ChatInput is inserted through controlled composer state at the current selection.
Textarea height is measured during layout after composer input changes and capped at 200px with overflowY auto when content exceeds the cap.
The non-hero composer reserves absolute bottom toolbar space outside the textarea scroll viewport with bottom margin instead of relying on internal textarea bottom padding.
Image paste attachment behavior remains on the existing image-specific branch.

confidence_notes: The RED test failed before the fix because text paste did not update controlled textarea value.
